channel.title: Posts on Matthew Hickson's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Matthew Hickson's Blog

item.title: Opinionated Software
item.description:
This one hits close to home these days…

Opinionated software, or software pre-configured with behaviours strongly-suggested (if not outright forced), can be great!

It’s when the user of the tool and the tool-maker disagree that opinionated software can be… not so great…

I like to think that I’m a pretty easygoing guy, but sometimes I run against the grain when it comes to the way my tools would prefer that I work.

item.title: Initial Thoughts on Hugo
item.description:
Well, it’s official!

I have a blog using Hugo!

Time for a quick ’n’ dirty collection of thoughts on the process thus far.

item.title: Migration of Lists
item.description: I have successfully migrated my previous Lists content to Hugo.
